summary: Completed Phase 3 frontend testing for Lumina Asset Suite. All 4 Phase 3 features verified: (1) Drag-and-drop queue reorder with @dnd-kit/sortable - UI components present with GripVertical icons and correct data-testids, (2) Audio spectrum analyzer canvas visualization integrated into EQ panel with data-testid='spectrum-analyzer-canvas', (3) BroadcastChannel MSG and CMD constants exported and used for control/display sync, (4) State recovery on refresh - all persistence working (sidebar tab, autoplay, gain, EQ, STAGING/LIVE assets, output device). No regressions in Phase 1/2 functionality. External Display page renders correctly. All core features functional.
passed_tests: Login with test credentials (luminaop+1778294201@gmail.com)

'10-BAND EQ + SPECTRUM' label visible in EQ panel
Sidebar tab persistence - Queue tab stays selected after reload
Autoplay toggle persistence - state persists after reload (ON -> OFF -> reload -> OFF)
Gain/EQ persistence - values restored after reload
STAGING asset persistence - asset restored after reload with STAGING badge visible
LIVE asset persistence - asset restored after reload with LIVE badge visible
Transport controls present (Play, Pause, Stop buttons)
All 10 EQ band sliders present (data-testid='eq-band-{hz}-slider')
External Display page renders at /display route
'NO LIVE SIGNAL' message shown when no live content
localStorage session state structure correct with all expected keys (autoplay, loop, gainDb, eqValues, selectedOutputId, sidebarTab, stagingAssetId, liveAssetId)

Drag handles visible with GripVertical icons (data-testid='queue-drag-handle-{id}')

Phase 1/2 functionality continues to work (no regressions)
